title: Creamy Saudi Arabian Lamb Kebabs
description: A salty and silky Saudi Arabian dish featuring tender lamb, this recipe is perfect for a Mediterranean-friendly dinner, made easy with a whisk and restaurant-quality results.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, making sure it reaches 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the yogurt, lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, ginger, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and mix until they are well coated with the yogurt mixture.
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a little space between each cube.
Grill the kebabs for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the lamb is cooked through and slightly charred.
Let the kebabs rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with fresh parsley and a side of creamy tzatziki sauce if desired.
